## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO progress and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO metrics showing positive trends: 449 clicks in a week, up from 125-165 keywords in top 10 positions in July to 96 keywords in top 3 positions currently](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Shoppable video keyword ranking improved from position 14 to 5-6 for some variations](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Team to focus on improving ranking for primary "shoppable video" keyword in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [On-page SEO optimization needed for product pages to better target key terms](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Total clicks reached 449 in a single week, largest jump seen so far](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Now at 96 keywords in top 3 positions, up from 125-165 keywords in top 10 positions in July](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [24 new backlinks gained in first two weeks of November vs. only a few in past 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Traffic trending up: August (800 clicks) -\> October (2000 clicks) -\> November (projected 2100-2200 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

### Shoppable Video Keyword Strategy

  - Currently ranking \#1 for industry-specific long-tail keywords (e.g. "shoppable video for beauty products")
  - [Main "shoppable video" keyword ranking improved from position 14 to 5-6 for some variations](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Plan to create 5-10 more articles on core "shoppable video" topics to boost overall ranking](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Building wide base of related keywords to internally link and boost main term](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

### On-Page SEO Improvements

  - [Product pages need optimization for meta titles, descriptions to better target key terms](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Team doesn't have direct access to edit product pages, will provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [New ultimate guide on "What is shoppable video" to be created as main ranking target](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Webflow staging environment pages getting indexed, causing duplicate content issues](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Need to add staging URLs to robots.txt and ensure proper no-index tags](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Migration from Webflow may be causing unintended indexing of draft content](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)

### Content Performance & Lead Generation

  - [Some blog posts getting significant relevant traffic (e.g. 26 clicks on beauty industry article)](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
  - [Opportunity to add targeted lead magnets to high-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=2181.0)
  - [Need to implement proper UTM tracking to attribute leads from blog content](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create executive summary report of 3-month SEO progress highlights for leadership](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [Prioritize improving ranking for main "shoppable video" keyword in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Develop recommendations for on-page SEO improvements to product pages](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Create new ultimate guide on "What is shoppable video" as main ranking target](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Resolve Webflow staging environment indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
  - [Implement lead magnets and proper tracking on high-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=2166.0)
  - [Prioritize creating Black Friday-related lead magnets for timely content](https://fathom.video/share/1BuqUdyUcbJDsccWKX4ZHDe2rvDBnH4K?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
